methods.method_name: modified protocol of the CTAB method
Direct purification with High Pure™ PCR Product Purification Kit
agarose gel purification with Wizard™ PCR Preps DNA Purification System
sequenced with the BigDye™ or dRhodamine Terminator Cycle Sequencing Ready Reaction Kit
Sequence data were collected with the ABI PRISM 3100-Avant Genetic Analyzer or 377 DNA Sequencer
Editing of sequence data were accomplished with the SeqEd DNA sequence Editor (ABI) Software Package

relationships.subject: SSU rDNA
relationships.object: modified protocol of the CTAB method
